title: The Banks and Financial Institutions Laws Amendment Act, 1980
title_en: The Banks and Financial Institutions Laws Amendment Act, 1980
description: An Act further to amend certain laws relating to Banks and Financial Institutions. WHEREAS it is expedient further to amend certain laws relating to Banks and Financial Institutions for the purposes hereinafter appearing; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Act may be called the Banks and Financial Institutions Laws Amendment Act, 1980 .

provisions.title: 2. Amendment of certain laws relating to Banks and Financial Institutions
provisions.content: 2. The laws mentioned in column 1 of the Schedule shall be amended in the manner indicated in column 2 thereof.
